title: Founder's Associate
industry: AI / AI IP & R&D platform (patent prosecution, generation)
requirements_met: Highly organised systematic operator with execution discipline: first employee at Minima, brought structure to early-stage chaos and ran multiple workstreams without slowing execution
Generalist across multiple workstreams (hiring, growth/marketing, operations): Ryan owned community, ops, GTM, fundraising support across his Minima tenure
Drive growth and GTM initiatives incl. events and LinkedIn content: led GTM/positioning/messaging, $4.5m presale (15x ROI), content marketing (blog 30K, X 40K)
Build and improve operational processes for scalability: built community infrastructure, metric dashboards, incentive/ambassador programmes
Strong communication and comfort working with founders: 6 years working directly with Minima founders seed-to-Series-A
gaps: Listing mentions hiring/recruiting exposure as ideal; Ryan has limited direct recruiting experience, though he has coordinated cross-functional teams
preferred_met: Early-stage company experience: 6 years scaling Minima seed to Series A
Operations building: built community ops infrastructure and processes from scratch
GTM knowledge: led product marketing and go-to-market at Minima

experience_fit.calculation: Founder's Associate role aimed at generalist operator; Ryan's 6yr founder-facing track record is an exact match = 15

industry_match.calculation: Ankar is an AI platform for IP/R&D teams (Atomico/Index backed) - genuine AI company = 15

location_match.calculation: London hybrid (3d/wk Shoreditch); user open to hybrid in London = 10

salary_penalty.reason: No salary listed; 'competitive salaries' + substantial equity, no penalty applied

notes: Ankar (Atomico/Index backed) builds an AI platform for IP/R&D teams supporting patent prosecution, protection and generation. Founder's Associate is a true generalist force-multiplier role across hiring, growth/marketing and operations - strong match for Ryan's first-employee profile.

must_haves.req: Highly organised systematic operator with execution discipline / create order from ambiguity
must_haves.note: First employee at Minima; brought structure to early-stage chaos across multiple workstreams seed-to-Series-A

must_haves.req: True generalist who moves across workstreams (growth/marketing, hiring, operations)
must_haves.note: Owned community, GTM, fundraising support, content, PR — textbook generalist operator

must_haves.req: Force multiplier; high agency; operates without heavy direction; comfort with founders
must_haves.note: ~4.4 yrs working directly with Minima founders; took ownership wherever needed

must_haves.req: Support growth/GTM incl. events, conferences, LinkedIn content & distribution
must_haves.note: Led GTM/positioning, $4.5m community presale (15x ROI), built content engine (blog 30k, X 40k), secured event/keynote slots

must_haves.req: Operations: automate manual workflows, build repeatable scalable processes
must_haves.note: Built community/ambassador/node-runner programmes from scratch; current AI-agent automation work is directly relevant, but no enterprise-process-engineering track record

must_haves.req: Hiring support: screening calls, candidate coordination, employer brand (ideal, not strict)
must_haves.note: Coordinated cross-functional teams as company scaled 1→30 but no explicit recruiting/talent-ops experience

met_strengths: Exact first-hire/founder-associate profile the role describes
AI-company domain (IP/R&D platform) — Ryan's AI-agent building narrative resonates
London / 3-days Shoreditch hybrid fits UK authorization & relocation plan
GTM + events + content is an unusually strong overlap with the role's growth pillar
interview_match.one_line_verdict: Near-ideal generalist-FA match with no hard gates — strongest of the five; hiring/process-engineering are the only soft gaps.
